name: Cappuccino Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine nuts, sugar, and margarine; press onto bottom of 9-inch spring-form cake pan. Bake at 325 degrees F., for 10 minutes.
2. In a large bowl, combine cream cheese, sugar, and flour. Mix on medium speed until well blended.
3. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
4. Blend in sour cream. Dissolve coffee granules and cinnamon in water.
5. Gradually add to the cream cheese mixture, mixing until well blended.
6. Pour over crust.
7. Bake at 450 degrees F., for 10 minutes. Reduce oven temperature to 250 degrees F. Continue baking for 1 hour.
8. Loosen cake from rim of pan; cool before removing rim of pan. Chill. Garnish with whipped cream and whole coffee beans if desired.
